title: Beta version android stopped syncing
creator: naturalp
content: Beta version of thunder it's has stopped syncing. I have a Titan mail server. My desktop version is working and syncing to it and android but my android version is not and gives a warning that it's not syncing when I try to move a message to another directory..if I delete emails they are not deleted on the server or on my laptop.

title: Can't save drafts

content: I'm using a cock[dot]li email and have pretty much accepted the default settings. I can't save drafts; that option is simply disabled.
